mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM answers a JOIN questions q ON q.id = a.question_id WHERE a.id = #{answerId} AND q.delflag = 'N' AND a.depth = 0 AND a.delflag = 'N' AND ( q.visibility = 'PUBLIC' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM team_members tm WHERE tm.team_id = q.team_id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.delflag = 'N' ) )
SELECT like_count FROM questions WHERE id = #{questionId}
SELECT like_count FROM answers WHERE id = #{answerId}
